snippet.title: Madhosh | Toxic (Hindi) | Rocking Star Yash, Tara Sutaria | Tanishk, Arslan, Faheem, Siddharth, Syed
snippet.description:
Love begins where reason ends... ❤️✨
Yash & Tara bring the magic alive in #Madhosh.

🎵 𝗦𝗼𝗻𝗴 𝗖𝗿𝗲𝗱𝗶𝘁𝘀
Song: Madhosh
Movie: Toxic
Music Composer: Tanishk Bagchi, Faheem Abdullah & Arslan Nizami
Singer: Siddharth Basrur
Lyricist: Arslan Nizami & Syed Murad Gilani
Mix & Master: Eric Pillai @Future Sound of Bombay
Assistant Mix Engineer: Michael Edwin Pillai

🎬 𝗖𝗮𝘀𝘁 & 𝗖𝗿𝗲𝘄
Starring: Yash, Kiara Advani, Nayanthara, Huma Qureshi, Tara Sutaria & Rukmini Vasanth
Written by: Yash & Geetu Mohandas
Directed by: Geetu Mohandas
Produced by: KVN Productions & Monster Mind Creations

Lyrics:
Main Saaki Kinaaron Ka 
Bhatka Hoon In Nigaahon Par 
Na Pucho Yun Khaar Hoon
Aur Duniya Se Yun Zaar Zaar Hoon 

Ishq Hain Kya 
Haa Mujhko Bata 
Teri Nazron Se Nazrein Mili  
Kya Badalne Laga Yeh Kaisa Samaa
Haan Andar Hi Andar Se Dil Keh Raha

Madhosh Main 
Na Hosh Mein 
Aur Dil Pada Kisi Soch Mein 

Haan.. Tere Paas Mein 
Tere Saath Se 
Lagta Hain Kuch Khaas Yeh 

(Haan Madhosh Main 
Na Hosh Mein 
Aur Dil Pada Kisi Soch Mein..) ..2 

(Main Aandhi Toofaano Sa 
Seena Chattano Sa 
Jalta Hoon Main Aag Sa) ..2 

Nigaahon Sa Tu 
Junoon Bann Raha 
Mere Dil Pe Tera Yeh Zakhm Laga 
Yeh Kaisi Khalish Rahi Darmiyaan 
Ke Andar Hi Andar Sulagta Raha 

Madhosh Main 
Na Hosh Mein 
Aur Dil Pada Kisi Soch Mein 

Haan.. Tere Paas Mein 
Tere Saath Se 
Lagta Hain Kuch Khaas Yeh 

(Haan.. Madhosh Main 
Na Hosh Mein 
Aur Dil Pada Kisi Soch Mein) ..2 

Chorus…

#Madhosh #Toxic #ToxicAFairyTale #Yash #RockingStarYash #GeetuMohandas #TaraSutaria

snippet.title: 1,00,000 UC NARUTO SET OPENING | JONATHAN IS BACK!! | BGMI!
snippet.description:
Hey Guys, I’m Jonathan Amaral, better known as Jonathan Gaming, a professional BGMI esports athlete and streamer.

Since the start of my journey, my dedication to the game has been defined by precision, consistency, and an unstoppable grind. As an assaulter, I’ve built a reputation for clutch performances and high-impact gameplay, earning respect in the BGMI community. 

Through years of dedication, I’ve honed my skills, adapting to every challenge and evolving with the game. Whether in high-stakes tournaments or streaming for the gaming community, my focus remains the same - pushing the limits and delivering top-tier gameplay.

Redbull Athlete 🧢
BMPS 2026 ELIMINATOR 🎯

snippet.title: Yeh Awarapan | Emraan Hashmi, Disha Patani | Vishesh Bhatt | Amaal, Arijit, Rashmi Virag| Awarapan 2
snippet.description:
Saath de raha, hai bas mera….
Yeh Awarapan 🕊️
 
Combining Amaal Mallik’s composition, Rashmi Virag’s lyrics and the arresting voice of Arijit Singh, ‘Yeh Awarapan’ is the second song release from the highly awaited ‘Awarapan 2’. Featuring Emraan Hashmi in the video, the song combines his past and present to show how his constant companion is only his Awarapan ❤️‍🩹
 
#YehAwarapan #ArijitSingh #EmraanHashmi #AmaalMallik #DishaPatani #Awarapan2 
 
Song - Yeh Awarapan
Music - Amaal Mallik
Singers - Arijit Singh
Lyrics - Rashmi Virag
 
Music Team -
Music Produced & Arranged by - Vaibhav Pani & BLUK
Additional Music Production - Rakesh Venkatapuram & Amaal Mallik.
Song Mixed & Mastered by - Pukhraj Sonkar.
Pianos - Vatan Dhuriya.
Electric Guitars - Kalyan Baruah, Ishan Das & Vaibhav Pani.
Acoustic Guitar - Ishan Das
Bass - Saurabh Suman
Drums - Gino Banks
Ishan’s Guitars recorded by -Nishant Pritam Das (Euphony Studios)
Drums & Bass recorded by Abhishek Khandelwal (YRF Studios), Assisted By - Dileep Nair.
Music Assistants: Mohak Chhabria, Luvdeep Saini, Gaurav Sanghvi, Anvay Patil, Rujul Deolikar.
Amaal Mallik Management: Mourjo Chatterjee.
Music Head Vishesh Films: Rohit Saini
 
Starring Emraan Hashmi, Disha Patani, Shabana Azmi, Suvinder Vicky, Vijayant Kohli, Aniruddh Rawal, Atul Kumar
 
Vishesh Films & Mukesh Bhatt Present
A Vishesh Bhatt Production
 
AWARAPAN 2
Produced By Vishesh Bhatt
Directed By Nitin Kakkar
Director of Photography Vishnu Rao
Editor Devendra Murdeshwar
Production Designer Teena Paradkar
Choreographer Mudassar Khan
 
Theatrical Distribution Pen Marudhar
In Cinemas 14th August 2026
 
Lyrics:
 
Song - Yeh Awarapan
Audio Version
 
Meri zindagi ka
Safar kho gaya hai
Tu iss dil se jabse
Juda ho gaya hai
 
Na koi pyaas hai
Meri inn aaknhon main
Na koi manzil hai
Meri in rahon main
Saath de raha hai bas mera
 
Yeh Awarapan

Kyun shor main dhundta hai yeh dil khaalipan

This is it—the ultimate footballing spectacle! Witness history in the making as Spain clashes with Argentina in the Grand Final of the FIFA World Cup 2026, fully simulated in EA Sports FC 26! After weeks of grueling battles, only two nations remain standing on the world’s biggest stage. With the legendary golden trophy on the line, the stage is set for a historic, breathtaking finale that will define legacies forever.

Spain enters the pitch looking to reclaim world dominance through their mesmerizing possession, high-pressing discipline, and youthful exuberance. Standing in their way is the reigning world champions, Argentina—a side fueled by unmatched passion, tactical perfection, and the relentless desire to defend their crown.

More than just a match, this is a clash of generations and footballing titans. Spain unleashes their phenomenal tactical blueprint, driven by the generational magic of Lamine Yamal, the flawless midfield mastery of Rodri, and the clinical, clutch presence of Mikel Oyarzabal. Meanwhile, Argentina counters with their iconic powerhouse spine, featuring the timeless genius of Lionel Messi, the lethal attacking instincts of Lautaro Martínez, and the tireless, elite midfield engine of Alexis Mac Allister.

✅ Will Spain’s brilliant tactical masterclass led by Yamal and Rodri conquer the world, or can Argentina’s golden generation—spearheaded by the magic of Messi—secure back-to-back world titles in a historic final victory?

If you enjoy hyper-realistic match simulations and in-depth tactical storytelling, don't forget to hit the like button and subscribe to our channel for more World Cup 2026 action!

Thank you for watching, and welcome to the Grand Final! 🏆⚽

🚩 राम भजन, रामायण चौपाई एवं सुंदरकांड

🔔 आरती, मंत्र जाप और प्रार्थनाएँ
📿 ध्यान एवं मेडिटेशन संगीत

हमारा उद्देश्य भक्ति संगीत के माध्यम से हर घर तक आध्यात्मिक शांति, सकारात्मक ऊर्जा और सनातन संस्कृति का संदेश पहुँचाना है।

snippet.description:
#sanjanapandey #rituchauhan #amitshukla #kanchanmishra #vidyasingh #arbindtiwari #trailer #bhojpurimovie #bhojpuri #trending 


IVY ENTERTAINMENT PRESENTS IN ASSOCIATION WITH SHREE AADYA ENTERTAINMENT

      
फ़िल्म – कोहबर (भोजपुरी फिल्म )
कलाकार – संजना पांडेय  ऋतू  चौहान  , अमित शुक्ला  कंचन  मिश्रा   विद्या  सिंह  निशा  तिवारी  प्रेम  दुबे

लेखक - अरबिंद तिवारी  
संगीतकार- ओम झा
गीतकार - अरबिंद तिवारी , प्यारे लाल यादव ,
छायांकन -  इमरान शगुन
संकलन - समीर शैख़ व जाहिद खान

प्रोडक्शन  कंट्रोलर  – रोशन  रॉय

मारुदा शर्मा, नेहा उपाध्याय, विशाल यादव
